title: T3SCH6 Trusts' Agreement to Allocate the Basic Exemption from Minimum Tax - Canada.ca
content:
## T3SCH6 Trusts' Agreement to Allocate the Basic Exemption from Minimum Tax
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Use this schedule when more than one qualifying trust is formed from contributions by the same individual and you have to allocate the $40,000 basic exemption from minimum tax among the trusts.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t3sch6-fill-15e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2014 – Fillable PDF (t3sch6-fill-14e.pdf) 2013 – Fillable PDF (t3sch6-fill-13e.pdf) 2010 – Fillable PDF (t3sch6-fill-10e.pdf)
